title: (2 Pack) Emergency Sleeping Bag w/ Drawstring Carrying Bag, Orange Blanket Kit
description:
Be prepared if you get caught in the cold with the ASR Outdoor Emergency Sleeping Bag! The ASR Outdoor Emergency Sleeping Bag is a great addition to any bug out bag or survival kit. Each bag is constructed of heavy duty tear resistant Mylar, and comes in a draw string carry case for easy transportation and storage when not in use. These sleeping bags are 100% reusable and will reflect your body heat for optimum warmth. It measures 3ft x 7ft unfolded, and easily rolls up to measure just 6" x 3" x 3" when not in use. Make sure to grab a few of these before your next adventure, or add some to your survival kit!
